description: Crafted from high quality materials, this fila Higgins shoe looks good on both the streets and the field. Durable with a casual wear-everywhere appeal, this shoe can score against pumped up Sports kicks on the field too!UpperSynthetic upper with tape detail and strategically placed overlaysPerforation details at the sides of the shoeCentral lace-upsPadded tongueEmboidered branding on the midfoot and tongueMeshed fabric inner with paddingSoft footbedMidsolePU midsoleOutsoleTPU outsole reinforced onto the upper at the heel to act as a heel guardRubber inlays on the outsole with patterned groovesPivot point on the big toe and heel regionShoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, cloth or brush, cold water and mild detergent to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a drierAvoid storing shoes in extremely hot conditions or in sunlight
